metadata.description: Data engineering agent that creates, extends, and explores dlt data pipelines

plugins.name: rest-api-pipeline
plugins.description: One shot REST API data pipelines with dlt (data load tool). Find sources, scaffold pipelines, debug, validate data, add endpoints, configure incremental loading, query data, and create interactive reports.

plugins.name: bootstrap
plugins.description: Prepare Python environment for dlthub workspace

plugins.name: data-exploration
plugins.description: Explore, analyze, and visualize data loaded by dlt pipelines. Query with ibis, map business ontologies, plan charts, and generate interactive marimo notebooks.
